summary: Standardize performance testing infrastructure
description: This ticket was split from {{DRIVERS-2666}}, please see that ticket for a detailed description.

summary: Rename "Reference" to "API Documentation" in PHP Library Documentation
description:
*Expected*
 * Rename "Reference" to "API Documentation" in PHP Library Documentation to be consistent with other drivers (like C#, Java, Node etc)
!image-2023-10-16-17-40-48-618.png|width=300!
 * If we change the URL, then setup redirect from old to new links, for users who may have bookmarked/saved the links on their end.

summary: Accept numeric field names in $match stage
listSearchIndexes() should support Aggregate "codec" option
description: {{listSearchIndexes()}} should include "codec" in the list of options it passes to the Aggregate operation. This was never done in PHPLIB-1143, and likely has to do with that project being implemented concurrently alongside PHPLIB-1182.

summary: GridFS close writable stream when the process ends to ensure the file is sent
Add GridFS example
description:
We already have a [tutorial for GridFS|https://www.mongodb.com/docs/php-library/current/tutorial/gridfs/].

Add a full example that can be run by developers directly.

summary: GridFS: Rename a file by filename - implement StreamWrapper::rename()
description:
According to the specification, renaming should apply to all the revisions.

https://github.com/mongodb/specifications/blob/master/source/gridfs/gridfs-spec.rst#renaming-stored-files

summary: GridFS: Delete a file by filename - implement StreamWrapper::unlink()
description:
Allow to remove files by filename using gridfs:// protocol.

This needs to be specified.
 * Remove all the revisions of the file
 * -Create a marker for the file as "deleted".-

[https://github.com/mongodb/mongo-php-library/pull/1138#discussion_r1424759860]

summary: Avoid Appending Write/Read Concern in Atlas Search Index Helper Commands
description: This ticket was split from {{DRIVERS-2761}}, please see that ticket for a detailed description.

summary: $sum operator accepts an expression or an array of expressions
Set default value to true for $exists query operator
description:
Query::exist() should be the same as Query::exist(true).

 

https://github.com/mongodb/mongo-php-builder/pull/56#discussion_r1466723522

summary: Provide an enum for date units
Collection::createIndex() does not pass "comment" option to createIndexes command
description:
{{Collection::createIndex()}} does not extract the {{comment}} option when delegating to the {{createIndexes()}} method. Instead, the option is left within the index specification document.

This issue dates back to the original implementation of the {{comment}} option in PHPLIB-749.

summary: Fix racy unified tests of unacknowledged writes
description: This ticket was split from {{DRIVERS-2877}}, please see that ticket for a detailed description.

summary: Sign PHPLIB releases
description:
h4. Description of Drivers Ticket:
    {panel:title=Epic Summary|borderStyle=dashed|borderColor=#ccc|titleBGColor=#239eb0|bgColor=#c2d2c2}

h4. Summary
The goals in the scope doc describe the work that needs to be done for this.

*Lead* : 
*Author* :

h4. Scope doc: https://tinyurl.com/yxwwc99r
{panel}
    See DRIVERS-714 for updated details.

summary: Disable causal consistency in implicit sessions
description: This ticket was split from {{DRIVERS-2369}}, please see that ticket for a detailed description.

summary: Update test definition in Client-Side encryption tests
description: This ticket was split from {{DRIVERS-2847}}, please see that ticket for a detailed description.

summary: Support "vectorSearch" type when creating search indexes
description: This ticket was split from {{DRIVERS-2768}}, please see that ticket for a detailed description.

summary: Replace Cursor type hints with CursorInterface
description:
CursorInterface was introduced in PHPC-1123, but it could not replace occurrences of Cursor in PHPLIB due to BC concerns. For instance {{Collection::find()}} has historically returned a {{MongoDB\Driver\Cursor}}.

This came up while reviewing PHPLIB-1022 (adding BSON codecs to the library).

summary: Remove IndexInfo::isGeoHaystack() method
description: {{IndexInfo::isGeoHaystack()}} has been deprecated since 1.16 (PHPLIB-1057) and can be removed in 2.0. Although some supported versions of MongoDB may still support the index type, the method itself is unlikely to be utilized and is ultimately not necessary since users can inspect the index document themselves.

summary: Remove deprecated Find options
TypeMap option not inherited from the Collection options in listSearchIndexes
Remove autoIndexId option for CreateCollection
description:
The {{autoIndexId}} option for CreateCollection has long been deprecated. Remove it in 2.0.

Note: there is a valid use case for specifying {{autoIndexId: true}} when creating a collection in the {{local}} database; however, that is an edge case and users can always resort to executing the [{{create}}|https://www.mongodb.com/docs/manual/reference/command/create/] command manually.

summary: Pull in spec tests through git submodule
description: To avoid manually updating spec tests, let's pull in tests from the specifications repository which can be updated through dependabot.

summary: Eliminate unnecessary killCursors command when batchSize == limit
description: This ticket was split from {{DRIVERS-1447}}, please see that ticket for a detailed description.

summary: Implement all $search stage options as named argument
description:
The SearchStage builder currently takes a generic array of config as parameter. In order. Now that this stage operator is properly documented, we can implement the named arguments.

https://github.com/mongodb/mongo-php-library/blob/1074e23e23dc395238de55f2b952626128a277f2/tests/Builder/Stage/SearchStageTest.php#L23-L30

summary: Use is_document to validate hint options
description:
{{is_document}} was introduced in [88731a5|https://github.com/mongodb/mongo-php-library/commit/88731a55c3dfd97b38ce0360f53b5b2674209754] for PHPLIB-1137. That function can be used in place of {{is_array}} and {{is_object}} to validate {{hint}} options.

This came up in the [code review|https://github.com/mongodb/mongo-php-library/pull/1525#discussion_r1832685239] for PHPLIB-1582.

summary: Relax requirement for optional fields and introducing appName for failPoints for transactions unified tests
description: This ticket was split from {{DRIVERS-3081}}, please see that ticket for a detailed description.

summary: Don't mandate the use of "distanceField" in $geoNear
description: This ticket was split from {{DRIVERS-3071}}, please see that ticket for a detailed description.

summary: Use git submodule for drivers-evg-tools
description:
drivers-evergreen-tools has seen changes that break builds at times. It would be better if we could manually upgrade drivers-evg-tools instead of auto-updating (through checking out the latest version during the build) to avoid random issues when it's updated upstream.

The GitHub Actions workflows that use drivers-evg-tools also need to import actions from the submodule, not from the repository.

summary: Allow passing an Agg Builder Pipeline to the aggregate method
description:
In v1, we could not change the signature of the method Collection::aggregate(array $pipeline) to also accept an instance of MongoDB\Builder\Pipeline object.

So we can change it in v2 an simplify usage of the Agg builder.

summary: Allow "string" type in every builder argument that accepts a "resolveTo*" type
description:
Since {{resolveTo}} types can be replaced with variable names, we must accept "{{{}string{}}}" type. 
Currently, we have to use {{Expression::fieldPath('fieldName')}} in places we could use the string {{{}$fieldName{}}}.

Example in [https://github.com/mongodb/mongo-php-library/blob/110aad7279aa4afb16511429c8e7cb68c8c521ea/tests/Builder/Stage/SearchStageTest.php#L672]

summary: Add index hint support for distinct command
description: This ticket was split from {{DRIVERS-2658}}, please see that ticket for a detailed description.

summary: Allow injection of instance of Encoder into the BuilderEncoder
description:
The MongoDB\Builder\BuilderEncoder doesn't allow dependency injection of sub-encoders. [https://github.com/mongodb/mongo-php-library/blob/fda4a4c70d62cbe4e379e17b4670310d25e967af/src/Builder/BuilderEncoder.php#L98] 

In order to accept more advanced use-cases (like using a service in the encoder to map field names), allow injecting instances of Encoder into the constructor.

Issue similar to [https://github.com/doctrine/dbal/pull/6705/]

summary: Builder: Accept DateTimeInterface objects where "date" values are accepted
description:
When passing a date to the aggregation builder, it would be convenient not having to convert it into UTCDateTime. The Aggregation Builder could accept any DateTimeInterface object and convert them automatically in the BuilderEncoder.

This would make sense for Laravel where we already convert DateTimeInterface into UTCDateTime. We cannot pass DateTimeInterface to the aggregation builder because of type restrictions.

 

Example where it could be used: [https://github.com/mongodb/laravel-mongodb/pull/3272#discussion_r1968250082]

summary: Database::withOptions() does not inherit builderEncoder option
description:
[mongodb/mongo-php-library@be2df01|https://github.com/mongodb/mongo-php-library/commit/be2df01eb8fa3d3071d4dc1889ea75a14ede93bc] for PHPLIB-1505 introduced the "builderEncoder" driver option. While it is handled by the various select methods and inherited in {{Collection::withOptions()}}, the option is never inherited in {{Database::withOptions()}}.

This should be fixed with a corresponding regression test.

summary: Rename WriteConcernFailed code name to WriteConcernTimeout
description: This ticket was split from {{DRIVERS-3007}}, please see that ticket for a detailed description.

summary: Fix `server-selection/tests/logging/operation-id.json:Failed client bulkWrite operation: log messages have operationIds`
description: This ticket was split from {{DRIVERS-2978}}, please see that ticket for a detailed description.

summary: Remove the BSON document size validation requirement for the client bulk write operation
description: This ticket was split from {{DRIVERS-3036}}, please see that ticket for a detailed description.

summary: Add CollectionInfo::isView()
description:
Reviewing [https://github.com/mongodb/laravel-mongodb/pull/3327]

Finding if a collection is a View checking the value of `$collectionInfo->getType()`.

Adding a `isView()` helper would be convenient.

summary: Fix handling of CRYPT_SHARED_LIB_PATH and SKIP_CRYPT_SHARED env vars in test suite
description:
PHPLIB-891 introduced the {{CRYPT_SHARED_LIB_PATH}} env var in [265810a|https://github.com/mongodb/mongo-php-library/commit/265810afc9c19247fded2d5530793ef1a91bf340]. {{CRYPT_SHARED_LIB_PATH}} is only injected into the {{autoEncryption.extraOptions.cryptSharedLibPath}} driver option for clients created by ClientSideEncryptionSpecTest (i.e. CSFLE prose tests and legacy spec tests). It is therefore never used for unified CSFLE tests introduced in [5d48a1e|https://github.com/mongodb/mongo-php-library/commit/5d48a1ed3e3700fb4b53d623977244c461ad699c] for PHPLIB-820.

On a related note, PHPLIB-911 introduced {{SKIP_CRYPT_SHARED}} in [0fe1a0f|https://github.com/mongodb/mongo-php-library/commit/0fe1a0f0b9ee54ce270980b2651b94fcc58921ff]. Looking at {{run-tests.sh}} in that commit, it appears that {{SKIP_CRYPT_SHARED}} is never actually consulted when deciding to export {{CRYPT_SHARED_LIB_PATH}}.

This issue appears to only affect library versions going back to 1.13.1, which is when {{SKIP_CRYPT_SHARED}} was introduced. Unified CSFLE spec tests did not appear in the test suite until 1.15.0.

summary: Support new $concatArrays and $setUnion aggregation accumulators
description: This ticket was split from {{DRIVERS-3052}}, please see that ticket for a detailed description.

summary: Support Aggregation Operator "$createObjectId" to generate random object ids
description: This ticket was split from {{DRIVERS-3228}}, please see that ticket for a detailed description.

summary: Support regular expressions in $replaceAll search string and $split delimiter
description: This ticket was split from {{DRIVERS-3226}}, please see that ticket for a detailed description.

summary: Metadata collections not dropped when an encrypted collection is dropped
Document BC policy
description: Ideally in repo under contributing guidelines

summary: Cast empty kms provider array to an empty BSON document
Broken link on Laravel MongoDB Driver v4.x documentation (Sessions page redirects incorrectly)
description:
On the MongoDB Laravel PHP driver documentation for version {*}4.x{*}, all pages work correctly except the *Sessions* page.

When visiting:[
👉 [https://www.mongodb.com/docs/drivers/php/laravel-mongodb/v4.x/sessions|https://www.mongodb.com/docs/drivers/php/laravel-mongodb/v4.x/sessions?utm_source=chatgpt.com]

It *redirects back to the 4.x Overview page* instead of showing the expected sessions documentation.

*Steps to reproduce:*
 # Go to [Laravel MongoDB v4.x docs|https://www.mongodb.com/docs/drivers/php/laravel-mongodb/v4.x/?utm_source=chatgpt.com].

 # Click on "HTTP Sessions" in the sidebar (or use the direct link above).

 # Instead of showing session-related content, it redirects back to the overview page.

*Expected Result:*
The page should display documentation about using MongoDB sessions with Laravel (v4.x).

*Actual Result:*
The page redirects back to the overview page, making the sessions docs inaccessible.

*Environment:*
 * Docs site: mongodb.com

 * Section: Laravel MongoDB PHP Driver v4.x

summary: Add example section to with_transaction docs
description: The documentation for the {{MongoDB\with_transaction}} function needs a short example to show the callback function and how to use the function. Other examples can be found in the documentation, which should be linked with the examples (possibly replacing the link in the "See Also" section.

summary: Accept iterable for custom encoders in BuilderEncoder
description: {{MongoDB\Builder\BuilderEncoder}} accepts an array of custom encoders. For convenience in Symfony application, the class should also accept an iterable to support iterators generated by using tagged services in the DIC.
